title: FakeNameEnhanced
body:
# FakeNameEnhanced This mod replaces your name in game (client side only) with anything that you'd like. # Usage `/fakename ` - Replaces your name with any string that you desire.
`/fakename` - Reset your fake name.
`/fakenamecolor` - Show available EnumChatFormatting options.
# Features Compatible with Patcher's optimized font renderer, also saves your data to a JSON. Also allows full EnumChatFormatting support! # Version support - Fabric 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8, 1.21.10, 1.21.11, 26.1.x - Forge 1.8.9
